name: Butterscotch Nibbles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan over low heat, melt butterscotch morsels and peanut butter, stirring frequently.
2. Stir in cereal until pieces are coated.
3. Stir in chocolate morsels just until combined but not melted.
4. Spread mixture on wax paper lined tray.
5. Chill 30 minutes or until coating is set.
6. Store in an airtight container.
